Specifies files to ignore in version control, including build files and waf lock files.

# Purpose
The file specifies patterns for files and directories that should be ignored by version control systems. It instructs the system to ignore any files or directories named `build` and any files that match the pattern `.lock-waf*`, which includes the waf lock file and any variations of it.
